# OptimizationFound

> Fired when a cost or performance optimization opportunity is found

**Channel:** webhook

## Payload

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| optimizationId | string | yes | - |
| optimizationType | string | yes | - |
| estimatedSavings | number | yes | - |

- **Handler:** `dispatchAlert`
- **Retry:** max 3 attempts (exponential)
